instruction: The cyan question dot should not be near-white. Restore its proper color on the archive icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/archive.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="21 8 21 21 3 21 3 8"/><rect x="1" y="3" width="22" height="5"/><line x1="10" y1="12" x2="14" y2="12"/></g>
  <circle id="qdot" fill="#fcfcfc" cx="110" cy="110" r="5" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/archive.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="21 8 21 21 3 21 3 8"/><rect x="1" y="3" width="22" height="5"/><line x1="10" y1="12" x2="14" y2="12"/></g>
  <circle id="qdot" fill="#06b6d4" cx="110" cy="110" r="5" />
</svg>
